content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor came to a treasure land that gave birth to immeasurable blood gold stones.

Ye Tian used the Infinite Extreme Dao Domain to cover the surroundings, and did his best to protect the Vicious Blood Ancestor, intercept the Infinite Ruins Monster who dared to attack, and let the Ruthless Blood Ancestor collect the Infinite Blood Golden Stone here with peace of mind.

Rumble!!!

The Blood Ancestor directly tore apart the land in this area, ingesting the immeasurable blood gold stones from the depths of the earth.

These immeasurable blood gemstones are blood-red, but there are also wisps of gold in the blood-red, so they are easy to identify.

However, the content of immeasurable bloodstone here is not high, and most of them are pure immeasurable bloodstone.

The value of the Immeasurable Blood Stone is too far from the Infinite Blood Stone, the Immeasurable Blood Stone can only be used for the third stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms to condense immeasurable blood, while the Immeasurable Blood Stone can be used for the fourth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms to improve their strength.

It can be said that compared to the Immeasurable Blood Stone, the Immeasurable Blood Stone is a waste product.

If it was the previous Blood Ancestor, he would still be tempted by the immeasurable blood stone, but now he can't look down on it.

However, just when the Raccoon Blood Ancestor was about to give up these immeasurable blood stones, Ye Tian said directly: "Raccoon Blood Ancestor, take these immeasurable blood stones together!"

"Endless Great Ancestor, this will delay a little more time, time is the most important thing for us now!" said the Bloody Great Ancestor hurriedly.

"It's a big deal to give you a little more immeasurable blood stone, the immeasurable blood stone will be useful to me!"

Ye Tiandao.

Seeing this, the Blood Ancestor had no choice but to collect those immeasurable bloodstones by the way.

Although there are not many immeasurable bloodstones here, the number of immeasurable bloodstones is really large.

The dense immeasurable bloodstone was found by the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, and then put away.

Soon, there was not a single Infinite Blood Stone and Infinite Blood Gold Stone left in this area.

Immediately, the Blood Ancestor began to look for other treasures that could breed immeasurable blood stones.

After a while, he found another treasure place that gave birth to immeasurable blood gold stones.

In this way, Ye Tian took the Raccoon Blood Ancestor to another treasure place, and asked the Raccoon Blood Ancestor to collect the Infinite Blood Gold Stone and the Infinite Blood Stone.

And Ye Tian is only responsible for intercepting the immeasurable ruin monsters and ensuring the safety of the Blood Ancestor, and there is no need to worry about the rest.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor gained more and more, but the immeasurable ruin monsters here were also killed a lot by Ye Tian, and there were not many immeasurable ruin monsters who dared to come to find trouble.

But Ye Tian had a feeling that their trouble was coming soon.

There are only so many immeasurable blood gold stones in this world, and as they continue to collect immeasurable blood gold stones, the number of immeasurable blood gold stones is gradually becoming scarce, and it is even difficult to find them.

However, Ye Tian asked the Blood Ancestor to look for the immeasurable bloodstones, and collected all the immeasurable bloodstones here as much as possible.

"Almost, it's time to leave!"

Ye Tian said.

"Hmm!"

The Blood Ancestor nodded, he had wanted to leave for a long time, it was really too dangerous here, anything could happen.

And the immeasurable blood gold stone here is gone, so he naturally wants to leave early.

"Endless Great Ancestor, this world will continue to give birth to immeasurable blood stones, but that is after the endless years, and at that time, I am afraid that you will all become the fifth stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

The Blood Ancestor sighed with emotion.

"Perhaps!"

Ye Tian didn't say much, he was about to leave this world with the Raccoon Blood Ancestor.

However, just as they were about to leave, a huge immeasurable ruin monster appeared.

This immeasurable ruin monster is covered with black tentacles, has hundreds of thousands of eyes, and looks extremely ugly.

However, the strength of this immeasurable ruin monster is very strong.

"Comparable to the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

Ye Tian's expression became solemn.

If it was just this immeasurable ruin monster, it would be enough, but what appeared was not an immeasurable ruin monster comparable to the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms!

Rumble!!!!

One after another, immeasurable ruin monsters comparable to the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms appeared, and there were a total of nine such immeasurable ruin monsters.

Seeing this scene, the Blood Ancestor was also terrified.

This is equivalent to nine fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, although it is not the kind of top-notch fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, but it is not something they can deal with!

"Endless Ancestor ......"

The Blood Ancestor looked at Ye Tian, and now he could only rely on Ye Tian.

"I'll intercept them, you go!"

Ye Tian said.

He can fall here, but the Blood Ancestor can't, after all, those immeasurable blood stones and immeasurable blood gold stones are still on the body of the Blood Ancestor!

"Thank you!"

The Bloody Ancestor said gratefully.

If Ye Tian really gave up on him, he couldn't help it.

Fortunately, Ye Tian was still willing to keep him, but Ye Tian dragged these immeasurable ruin monsters by himself, so Ye Tian himself was in danger!

The Blood Ancestor guessed that Ye Tian was a clone, but the loss of a clone was also an unimaginable loss!

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian fought with these fourth-stage immeasurable ruin monsters, he intercepted these immeasurable ruin monsters with his own strength, and forcibly sent the Blood Ancestor away.

Soon, the battle spread from this world to the immeasurable ruins of the outside.

Their battle quickly attracted the nearby Infinite Ruins Monsters, and if they were delayed here for a while, the situation would be even more dangerous.

The Raccoon Blood Ancestor did not hesitate, and directly chose to flee from here, if he left a little later, Ye Tian would not be able to protect him.

At this time, the Blood Ancestor was even burning his own immeasurable blood and flying at a speed beyond its peak, trying to get to the location it came from, and then using the token to leave the Immeasurable Realm Ruins.

Finally.

The Bloody Great Ancestor rushed to the location where he came, but Ye Tian did not rush over.

After he opened the passage, he didn't flee immediately, he was still waiting.

However, Ye Tian still didn't come over in time.

"Endless Great Ancestor, I can only go first!"

He went straight back to the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering, and the passage crack soon disappeared.

......

The other side.

Ye Tian was fighting happily, he was ready to give up this replica body, but he didn't want to be killed so easily.

Therefore, he fought with all his might.

Soon, these immeasurable ruin monsters were also injured.

And Ye Tian has been burning immeasurable blood to fight, but his immeasurable blood recovers quickly, so his combat effectiveness is very long-lasting.

Gradually, Ye Tian seemed to have the upper hand.

Abrupt.

These immeasurable ruin monsters actually escaped and no longer fought with Ye Tian.

Obviously, they were afraid, for fear of being killed by Ye Tian.

"I didn't expect this replica body to survive!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Immediately, he thought about it carefully, this Infinite Ruins still had a lot of value to explore, so he planned to copy a third-stage Infinite Ruins monster here in case he needed it.
